Package jline.lang.distributions

This package contains statistical distributions used to specify arrival rates, service rates, and item popularities
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    APH  
    Binomial  
    ContinuousDistribution  
    Cox2
    This class is a subclass of the general Coxian distribution class, but simplifies the usage for the special case of a two-phase Coxian distribution.
    Coxian  
    CumulativeDistribution<T>  
    Det  
    Disabled  
    DiscreteDistribution  
    DiscreteSampler
    Class for discrete distributions specified from the probability mass function
    Distribution  
    Erlang  
    Exp  
    Gamma  
    Geometric  
    HyperExp  
    Immediate  
    Lognormal
